query: faded polaroid old photograph yellowed vintage snapshot
message: sub:analog_degradation/faded_polaroid — anti_aesthetic — sepia, yellowing, faded snapshots, browned old photos

response.objective_caption: A person wearing a cream-colored sweater with small dark dots and dark pants stands in an interior room, seen through a large bright yellow circular ring in the foreground. The figure is visible from the shoulders down, with one hand positioned near the midsection. Warm light bathes the background walls and doorway in orange tones.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Intentional motion blur softens a large bright yellow ring and the subject's hand into streaked, dynamic shapes. A person in a cream dotted sweater and dark pants stands in an interior space, visible from the shoulders down with their head cropped out by the top edge of the frame and their torso partially hidden behind the dominant glowing ring. A sickly yellow cast washes over the scene, shifting skin tones and surfaces toward an unsettling sodium-vapor hue, while obstructed cropping creates a faceless, incomplete presence within the unstable composition.
